Submit.title: Submit Your Entry
Submit.description: Welcome to submit your TRAE Demo! Please fill in the following information. We will review and display your work on TRAE DEMO WALL. All information will be used for project showcasing and community interaction, please ensure accuracy.
Submit.projectNamePlaceholder: Give your project a catchy name
Submit.introPlaceholder: Briefly describe the core value of your project (within 100 characters)
Submit.uploadDrag: or drag and drop an image here
Submit.problemPlaceholder: Describe the core pain points your project addresses...
Submit.successMessage: Your project data has been generated and is downloading. Please send the downloaded JSON file to the competition administrator for review and publishing.
Submit.validationNameMin: Project name must be at least 2 characters
Submit.validationIntroMin: Introduction must be at least 10 characters
Submit.validationProblemMin: Problem description must be at least 20 characters
Submit.validationSolutionMin: Solution must be at least 20 characters
Submit.validationDemoUrl: Please enter a valid Demo link
Submit.validationRepoUrl: Please enter a valid repository link

Project.aboutProjectDesc: This project was submitted at the TRAE Friends@Hangzhou offline event. If you're interested in this project, you can learn more through the code repository or Demo link.

Footer.rights: © 2026 TRAE DEMO WALL. All rights reserved.

Admin.title: Admin Dashboard
Admin.subtitle: Manage and monitor platform data
Admin.userManagementDesc: Manage user accounts, role assignments and permissions
Admin.contentReviewDesc: Review submitted works and manage displayed content
Admin.dataStatsDesc: View platform traffic, user activity and analytics
Admin.systemSettingsDesc: Configure platform parameters and system maintenance
